$comment: Tiny hand-curated overlay for Logic Apps Standard runtime additions that are NOT in the published 2016-06-01 schema and NOT exposed via the operationGroups API. Each entry MUST cite a verifiable source. Anything that fits in builtins-schema.json or builtins-runtime.json belongs there, not here. If this file grows beyond a handful of entries, that is a signal to investigate why.

ManagedServiceIdentity.identity: string (managed identity resource id, optional; defaults to system-assigned)
ManagedServiceIdentity.$justification: Logic Apps Standard supports MSI auth on the Http action via the workflow extension. Documented at https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/logic-apps/authenticate-with-managed-identity. Not in the classic 2016-06-01 schema's Http.authentication oneOf.
